import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import axios from "axios"; import { CardFooter, Button, IconButton } from "@material-tailwind/react"; function UserSection() { const [data, setData] = useState([]); const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1); useEffect(() => { axios .get(`https://fimat-group-api.onrender.com/user`) .then((item) => setData(item.data)) .catch((error) => console.log(error)); }, []); const recordsPerPage = 7; const lastIndex = currentPage * recordsPerPage; const firstIndex = lastIndex - recordsPerPage; const currentData = data.slice(firstIndex, lastIndex); const npage = Math.ceil(data.length / recordsPerPage); const numbers = [...Array(npage + 1).keys()].slice(1); const prePage = () => { if (currentPage !== firstIndex) { setCurrentPage(currentPage - 1); } }; const changePage = (id) => { setCurrentPage(id); }; const nextPage = () => { if (currentPage !== lastIndex) { setCurrentPage(currentPage + 1); } }; return ( <>

nombres d'utilisateurs

{data.length} utilisateurs
{currentData.map((item) => { return ( ); })}
Name
Email address Edit
{item.imgUrl === null ? ( ) : ( )}

{item.lastname} {item.name}

{item.username}

{item.phone}
Utilisateur {item.email}
{item.date}
{numbers.map((n, i) => { return ( <> { changePage(n); }} > {n} ); })}
); } export default UserSection;
